company.name: Just Packaging Solutions
company.address: Plot No. 73, Vibrant Mega Ind. Park, Zak-Kadadara Road, Vahelal, Ahmedabad - 382433, Gujarat, India
company.facility_location: Vibrant Mega Industrial Park, Vahelal GIDC, Ahmedabad
company.about: Just Packaging Solutions is manufacturer and supplier/exporter with over 30 years of experience in the industry. We offers an extensive product range in flexible packaging and laminated roll. We use next generation technology and adapt tailor made approach for every customer. We are using the best quality of polymers, ink and all the necessary material require for manufacturing. Our vision is to set standard for uncompromising quality, continuously striving to exceed expectations and deliver products, services of the higher caliber.
company.vision: We Strive to emerge as pre-eminent flexible packaging company by developing all complaint flexible packaging material that enhances life & visibility of goods as well as is eco-friendly.
company.sustainability: We have always strived to create sustainable manufacturing footprints which will complement our capacity to deliver and also achieve environmental objectives. The company aims to achieve this through initiatives like reducing energy consumption, improving water & air quality and recycling. As a result, the product that the consumers have at their disposal carries very less carbon footprint. Certain equipments such as pallets are recyclable which ensures its longevity. Our approach to Sustainability goes beyond being environmental friendly as we consider product utility as an essential component of a modern society. We have always strived to develop innovative ways that offer improved processes, designs and systems, yet have minimal impact on our surroundings.
company.product_range_intro: Our portfolio include a wide variety of foils, pouches (Plastic and non-plastic) inclusive of 3D and 4D pouches with re-closable options, confectionery foils, innolock pouches, pocket PTC zipper, etc. We provide packaging solutions in various industries including Confectionery, Tea, Flour, Sugar, Pulses and cereals, Sea Food, Incense Sticks, Soap and Detergent, Seeds, Cosmetics, Wafer and Snacks, Bakery etc.

products.category: Non Plastic Packaging Solutions - Eco Friendly - 100% Compostable

items.name: 100% Compostable Shopping Bag
material_caution: Due to the basic nature of compostable it is effected by long time sun exposure.
Shelf life can be between 6-12 months.
Higher thickness is required to carry X weight compared to the thickness required by plastic bags to carry same X weight.
advantages: Compostable grocery bags recycle efficiently in less time and don't release harmful chemicals or elements.
They can be recycled into any other things and can be used again.
Regular plastic is also recyclable, but the procedure includes releasing toxic elements unsuitable for the environment.
These are most suitable to malls / shopping centers which operate in the province where plastic usage is restricted.
customization: 100% transparent / 100% Opacity (Any color) / semi transparent.
With Multi color printing on transparent or non-transparent material.
Any customizable Shape and Size as per customer requirement.
Ready to sell type packaging.

items.name: Trash Bag

suitable_for.description: For regular household waste, a bag thickness between 0.7 to 1.2 millimeters (mils) is usually sufficient.
If you often dispose of heavy or sharp waste, opt for thicker bags with a thickness of 1.5 mils or more. These bags provide extra strength and reduce the risk of tearing or leakage.

customization: 100% transparent / 100% Opacity (Any color) / semi transparent.

Can be given in box with your branding (as shown and created for VB).
